headline: Grand Theft Auto-Maker Rockstar Games Data Breach: Hackers Claim Theft Of Nearly 80 Million Records Through Anodot And Snowflake Vulnerability
summary: ShinyHunters claims it stole nearly 80 million records from Rockstar Games via a third-party breach involving Anodot and Snowflake.
